name: documents
description: Create, edit, redline, comment on, render, verify, and export DOCX document files in Anybox.

interface.longDescription: Create, edit, inspect, render, verify, redline, comment on, and export DOCX document files locally. Use Documents when the durable output or target is a document, doc, docs, Word file, memo, report, or writing artifact.
defaultPrompt: Draft a project memo as a document
Create a document from this outline
Write a polished doc for this plan

skillPreviews.name: Documents
skillPreviews.description: Create, edit, redline, and comment on `.docx` files inside the local Anybox workspace, with a strict render-and-verify workflow. Use `render_docx.py` to generate page PNGs (and optional PDF) for visual QA, then iterate until layout is flawless before delivering the final DOCX.
